title.en: In this case, the Endless Lord did not dare to ...

content.en:
The Lord of the True Dragon also thought that Ye Tian was the original strength, that is, an ancient-level genius of the Third Bone Transformation Realm, which was equivalent to the top five Bone Transformation Realm combat power.

And he is a boundary-breaking genius of the four bone transformation realms, and his combat power is also at this level, no less than Ye Tian, the master of infinity.

And.

He can also find a few powerhouses with four Bone Transformation Realm combat power.

In this case, the Endless Lord did not dare to resist.

Subsequently.

He contacted three Bone Transformation Realms, and all of them had four Bone Transformation Realm combat powers.

These three Bone Transformation Realms are the Lord of Bizun, the Lord of the Dragon Cave, and the Lord of Anhai, all of which are very close to the Fifth Bone Transformation Realm.

They also all wanted to break through to become the fifth bone transformation realm, but they have never been able to break the shackles.

This time, I finally saw hope, and naturally I wanted to cooperate with the Lord of the True Dragon.

this day.

Whew!!!

The Lord of the True Dragon and these three bone transformations, plus several other bone transformation realms of the True Dragon Cave Heaven, came to the Taixuan Sea of the human race together.

Here, too, there is a part of the Terrans.

......

Taixuanhai.

Many bone transformation realms will be discovered by the human race in the future.

Moreover, there is also the Terran Bone Transformation Realm here.

It's just that Ye Tian often needs to mobilize the replication body, so there is no extra replication body sitting here.

But Ye Tian still learned the news as soon as possible and hurried over.

"What is the Lord of the True Dragon doing with so many Bone Transformation Realms going to Taixuanhai?"

He was a little confused.

Soon.

He arrived at the Taixuan Sea and met the Lord of the True Dragon.

"Lord of the True Dragon, you came to Taixuanhai without informing me, what are you doing?"

Ye Tian asked.

Rumble!!!!!

The True Dragon Lord's aura covered the entire Taixuan Sea, and it was obviously a bad coming.

At this time, the Lord of the True Dragon said: "Lord of Endless, the Taixuan Sea was divided into the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, but it is not the territory of your human race!"

"That's also under Xishan, it has nothing to do with you, right?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The Lord of the True Dragon smiled and said, "Xishan is one with us, and if I say that there is a relationship, there is a relationship." I heard that you entered the land of eternity through our passage, and you don't know how to return yet, so you must have obtained a lot of good things. "

"So what?"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"No, I just want to get some resources!" When the Lord of the True Dragon said this, his breath exploded, as if he was about to do it at any time.

And the same is true for several other bone transformation realms, as long as the True Dragon Lord gives an order, they will do it.

Now.

Ye Tian was clear about the purpose of the Lord of the True Dragon, he couldn't get along in the land of the other side of eternity, and he didn't dare to enter the land of the other side of eternity, so he hit his resource idea.

Maybe the Lord of the True Dragon still thinks that he is the strength before, after all, not many primeval eras have passed, and he doesn't know that he has broken through.

Rumble!!!!

The aura on Ye Tian's body burst out, and the realm was undoubtedly revealed.

Four bone transformations!!!

This is an ancient-level genius of the four bone transformation realms!

With such a cultivation, the combat power is comparable to the six bone transformation realms, and it can be called an invincible existence.

The Lord of the Ruins is also this realm!

"The Endless Lord has misunderstood!"

The Lord of the True Dragon hurriedly confessed.

"Misunderstanding, take me one trick and don't die, let's talk about misunderstanding!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Where does the Lord of the Dragon Cave dare to take a move, he will flee directly.

Swish!

He shuttled instantaneously, wanting to leave.

However, he wanted to escape in front of Ye Tian, how could that be possible!

Airplanes!!!

The surrounding void froze.

The next moment, Ye Tian used the Ancient Realm Technique to catch up with him in an instant, and then cast the Ancient God and Demon Spear to kill him in an instant.

Click!!

The body of the Lord of the Dragon Cave was shattered, and he completely fell and died.

Seeing this scene, the Lord of the True Dragon trembled.

This combat power is even more terrifying than the Lord of the Ruins!

The top six bone transformation realm battles are not as good as Ye Tian now!

He really had his brain pumped, so he dared to come to rob and threaten Ye Tian!

"How can it be weak to survive in the land of eternity and bring back a lot of resources!"

The Lord of the True Dragon regretted it immensely.

His huge dragon body knelt down directly and begged for mercy: "Endless Lord, spare your life, we haven't done anything, it's not a crime that is unforgivable." "

"I said, take me a trick, and I'll talk about it if I don't die. "

Ye Tian said again.

However, how dare they take it!

The strength of the Lord of the Dragon Cave is not weak, but he was still killed with one move!

Except for the Lord of the True Dragon, how could the other Bone Transformation Realms be able to stop it?

"Run away together, run away one by one, he can't let us go. If he kills them one by one, there will be no chance!"

The Lord of Anhai summoned the other bone transformation realms, Dao.

The other bone metamorphoses agreed.

Anyway, if they escaped together, Ye Tian would be able to kill them all, and he couldn't stop them at all.

Whoa!!!

A bone transformation realm fled, and even the Lord of the True Dragon moved, and he didn't want to be captured.

"Run, can you run?"

Ye Tian's voice filled the surrounding void.

"The top primeval technique - Void Upside Down!"

Airplanes!!!

The surrounding void began to turn upside down, and there was no way to escape from this area even if these bone transformation realms shuttled.

This primeval technique is useless against strong enemies, but it is very useful for the weak, and you can't escape if you want to.

"Not good!"

A bone-changing person's face changed drastically.

The void is upside down, and it is as if they are trapped in a void cycle and cannot escape.

Thundered!!!!

They kept attacking the Void, but they couldn't break it for a while.

Puff puff!!!

One of the Bone Transformation Realms was killed by Ye Tian's Ancient God and Demon Spear.

In an instant, the Bone Transformation Realm of the True Dragon Cave Heaven was completely destroyed, and the Lord of Anhai and the Lord of Bizun were also killed, without the power to resist.

In the end, only the Lord of the True Dragons remained.

This moment.

The Lord of the True Dragon is extremely remorseful, so he shouldn't be so greedy!

Of course, this also has something to do with his character, once he threatened other bone metamorphosis creatures like this, and in exchange for a lot of opportunities, he grew to this point.

According to his plan, snatching Ye Tian's resources and cultivating to break through to the fifth bone transformation realm, his combat power would be no less than that of the Lord of the Ruins, and he would dare to enter the land of eternity and get more opportunities.

When the time comes, he may even be stronger than the Lord of the Ruins.

His imagination was beautiful, but it failed at the first step.

"Endless Lord spare your life!"

The Lord of the True Dragon begged for mercy for the last time.

However, he was greeted by Ye Tian's Ancient God Demon Spear.

Poof!!!!

The Ancient God Demon Spear pierced through his head, piercing out of his dragon's tail and directly through his entire body.

Rumble!!!!

The Lord of the True Dragon's whole body was shattered, all the immeasurable bones were shattered, and the immeasurable will was shattered, and soon he completely fell and died.

"Go to the True Dragon Cave Heaven, there is no need for this top overlord-level strength to exist!"

Ye Tian said lightly.
